ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adjectives" (
  "adjective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjective */,
  "adjective_name" TEXT /* Name of the adjective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjective */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the adjective (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjective was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjective was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the personality trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the personality trait */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trait (e.g., Big Five, MBTI) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trait was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trait was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the rating */,
  "adjective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjective being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the participant (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was recorded */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the rating is associated with */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the rating (e.g., experiment condition, survey question) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_adjective_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjective_id") REFERENCES adjectives ("adjective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for communication */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the question is associated with */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., demographic, trait-related) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being responded to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the response is associated with */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the response (e.g., experiment condition) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjective_traits" (
  "adjective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjective */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personality trait */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjective_id", "trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_correlations" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personality trait */,
  "correlated_trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correlated personality trait */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the traits */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the correlation was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the correlation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id", "correlated_trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjective_frequency" (
  "adjective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjective */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the adjective */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the frequency is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjective_frequency_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_frequency" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personality trait */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the trait */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the frequency is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_frequency_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_coefficients" (
  "adjective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjective */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personality trait */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the adjective and trait */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the coefficient is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coefficient was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coefficient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjective_id", "trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_coefficients_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was made */,
  "related_table" TEXT /* Table to which the annotation is related */,
  "related_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row in the related table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
